title: Research Associate I
description:
Kaiser Permanente is an integrated healthcare system serving 12M+ members. We deliver high-quality, evidence-based care across prevention and treatment.

We're seeking a Research Associate I to join our Integrated Healthcare team in Dallas. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Conduct clinical research studies and coordinate participant enrollment
Maintain regulatory documentation and ensure protocol compliance
Collect and manage study data with attention to accuracy and confidentiality
Assist with data analysis and preparation of research reports
Communicate with study participants and healthcare providers
Support principal investigator and research team activities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Life Sciences, Public Health, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years in clinical research, epidemiology, or biomedical research
